treatment_information.treatment_response: Vitamin E levels returned to normal (11.7 μg/ml)

treatment_timeline.event: Noticed abnormal ocular movements, walking disorder with frequent falls and language difficulties
Referred to Neuropaediatrics unit; diagnosed with oculomotor apraxia, ataxic gait and dysmetria
Low vitamin E levels detected; started oral vitamin E treatment
EMG results showed sensitive axonal polyneuropathy

patient_outcome.final_status: Typical AOA1 clinical presentation without a severe phenotype
